title: Contract Analyzer - Analyses
description: Contract analysis results including extracted terms, risk assessments, and standard term comparisons. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Contract Name.description: Name or title of the analyzed contract document for identification.

File Path.description: Original file path of the contract document that was analyzed.

Contract Type.description: Type of contract detected during analysis.

Summary.description: Brief summary of the contract's key terms and overall assessment.

Key Terms.description: Structured extraction of key terms across 7 categories: Payment, Duration/Renewal, IP, Confidentiality, Liability, Termination, Warranty.

Risk Level.description: Overall risk assessment using RAG classification.

Risk Flags.description: List of identified risk flags with severity levels and descriptions.

Compared To Standard.description: Whether this analysis included comparison against standard terms template.

Comparison Notes.description: Detailed comparison results showing deviations from standard terms with recommendations.

Analyzed At.description: Timestamp when the contract analysis was performed.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Contract Name serves as the primary identifier. Risk Level uses RAG classification: Red = high risk (needs lawyer), Yellow = medium risk (needs attention), Green = low risk (acceptable).
